name: Scallops with Snow Peas
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound snow peas, trimmed and halved
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cornstarch, soy sauce, and sesame oil in a shallow dish; stir well to mix.
2. Heat wok with half the oil over medium heat until smoke begins to rise. Add garlic and ginger; stir-fry for 30 seconds.
3. Add snow peas, carrot, salt, and water. Stir-fry for 3 minutes. Remove to a serving platter.
4. Heat remaining oil in the same wok over high heat. Add green onions and stir-fry for 30 seconds.
5. Return snow pea mixture and sauce to the wok. Bring to a boil.
6. Serve immediately. Enjoy!
